title: Steve's Pizzeria
description: A mod that adds different pizzas to Minecraft. This adds different pizza types.
body:
![The title for the mod. Text: Steves Pizzeria by Armadillomike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/454bdb67ecdf7b83ff3db68eae0f8731846ebadd.png)

Steve's Pizzeria is a Minecraft mod for version **1.21.1** built on the **NeoForge** modding platform. This mod brings pizza-themed content and features into your Minecraft world, allowing you to run your own pizzeria, make pizzas, and more!

> **Note:** This is a work-in-progress (WIP) mod. Features and content are subject to change and expansion.

## Features

- 🍕 Pizza crafting, baking, and eating!
- Custom recipes and ingredients

*(More features will be added as development progresses)*

## Installation

1. **Download and install [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/)** for Minecraft 1.21.1.
2. **Download the latest release** of Steve's Pizzeria from the [Versions Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/steves-pizzeria/versions).
3. Place the downloaded `.jar` file in your Minecraft `mods` folder.
4. Launch Minecraft with the NeoForge profile.
